{"id":929,"date":"2026-07-20T12:19:15","date_gmt":"2026-07-20T12:19:15","guid":{"rendered":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/?post_type=trail&p=929"},"modified":"2026-07-22T03:55:39","modified_gmt":"2026-07-22T03:55:39","slug":"incomplete-buhisan-mini-forest-loop","status":"publish","type":"trail","link":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/trails\/incomplete-buhisan-mini-forest-loop\/","title":{"rendered":"Incomplete\/ Buhisan Mini Forest Loop"},"content":{"rendered":"\n

This trail is currently being explored. Only the verified section visited during the latest field exploration is shown on the Trail Atlas<\/a>.<\/p>\n\n\n\n

\n\n\n\n

Exploration date:<\/strong> June 2026
Objective:<\/strong> Verify a downloaded GPX route that appears to form a loop through the Buhisan forest near the Buhisan Reservoir.
Current extent:<\/strong> The verified route extends deep into the forested area of Buhisan.
Reason the exploration ended: <\/strong>The early sections of the trail were well-trodden and appeared to be regularly used by hikers and local residents. During the field visit, a local resident advised that the loop passed through a densely vegetated section, which was later encountered. One section crossed a small river, where the continuation of the trail remained visible. Farther along the route, however, erosion made it difficult to identify the trail on the opposite side. The field exploration ended at this point, and the route was retraced.<\/p>\n\n\n\n

Field Notes<\/strong>: <\/p>\n\n\n\n

    \n
  • A possible continuation may be identified by approaching the route from the opposite direction during a future field visit.<\/li>\n\n\n\n
  • The densely forested section contained several spring water collection points with multiple water pipes. Their presence suggests that local residents may access the area regularly.<\/li>\n\n\n\n
  • Several thorny plants were observed. At the time of the field visit, parts of the trail in this section were faint and no longer clearly defined.<\/li>\n\n\n\n
  • Some sections were heavily eroded, possibly due to strong water flow.<\/li>\n\n\n\n
  • Additional time will be required during a future field visit. Dense vegetation and tree cover obscure the footpaths, limiting the usefulness of satellite imagery when reviewing the route.<\/li>\n<\/ul>\n\n\n\n","protected":false},"featured_media":930,"template":"","trail_location":[118],"trail_feature":[],"trail_type":[],"trail_difficulty":[],"class_list":["post-929","trail","type-trail","status-publish","has-post-thumbnail","hentry","trail_location-cebu"],"_links":{"self":[{"href":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/trail\/929","targetHints":{"allow":["GET"]}}],"collection":[{"href":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/trail"}],"about":[{"href":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/types\/trail"}],"wp:featuredmedia":[{"embeddable":true,"href":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/media\/930"}],"wp:attachment":[{"href":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/media?parent=929"}],"wp:term":[{"taxonomy":"trail_location","embeddable":true,"href":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/trail_location?post=929"},{"taxonomy":"trail_feature","embeddable":true,"href":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/trail_feature?post=929"},{"taxonomy":"trail_type","embeddable":true,"href":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/trail_type?post=929"},{"taxonomy":"trail_difficulty","embeddable":true,"href":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/trail_difficulty?post=929"}],"curies":[{"name":"wp","href":"https:\/\/api.w.org\/{rel}","templated":true}]}}
